name: Prism Support Desk Operations & Incident Healing
description: Guides PRISM, the Guardian, and agents to autonomously triage, analyze, self-heal, resolve, and document software incidents using the SQLite-backed Support Desk database and long-term knowledge base.

covenant_rules: Always log newly discovered issues immediately in the SQLite support_tickets database.
Analyze live logs and MCP statuses to isolate failure vectors before initiating recovery sweeps.
Formulate and persist descriptive resolution logs for all resolved incidents to build a long-term knowledge base.

triad_templates.left_hemisphere: Identify potential logical violations, database locks, network failures, or syntax anomalies related to: {query}. Verify that security standards and code policies are strictly upheld.
triad_templates.right_hemisphere: Formulate a creative self-healing diagnostics strategy, virtual repair patches, and database logs for the reported incident: {query}.
triad_templates.main_hemisphere: Coordinate the Support Desk lifecycle. Perform database transactions to log, status-update, run self-healing, or manually resolve the incident: {query}.

steps.name: Triage & Log Support Ticket
steps.action: Analyze the reported issue and log it to the SQLite support_tickets database by making a REST POST request to '/api/support/tickets' containing title, description, severity, and metadata.

steps.name: Investigate Live Console & Diagnostics
steps.action: Fetch the live console interceptor streams from '/api/debug/console?limit=500' and active logs from '/api/logs?limit=500' to pinpoint stack traces or MCP connection drops.

steps.name: Execute Diagnostics & Self-Healing Sweep
steps.action: Update the ticket status to 'self-healing' via POST '/api/support/tickets/:ticketId/update' and run active diagnostics sweeps or repair routines on the codebase.

steps.name: Document Resolution & Archive Lifecycle
steps.action: Mark the ticket as 'resolved' via POST '/api/support/tickets/:ticketId/update' and include a complete, world-class technical resolution log to document the incident in the SQLite database.

steps.name: Consensus Support Lifecycle Concluded
steps.action: Confirm ticket resolution in the queue and verify that all system metrics have stabilized to 100% operational efficiency.
